check_content_excerpt:
Verify the Ubuntu operating system enforces a 60-day maximum password lifetime for new user accounts by running the following command: 
 
$ grep -i ^pass_max_days /etc/login.defs 
PASS_MAX_DAYS    60 
 
If the "PASS_MAX_DAYS" parameter value is greater than 60, or commented out, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Configure the Ubuntu operating system to enforce a 60-day maximum password lifetime. 
 
Add or modify the following line in the "/etc/login.defs" file: 
 
PASS_MAX_DAYS    60
title: The Ubuntu operating system must enforce a 60-day maximum password lifetime restriction. Passwords for new users must have a 60-day maximum password lifetime restriction.
